_description: Artist with 3 recordings but no publishing registrations. publishing.worksCount is 0 yet catalog has recordings. Models an artist whose distribution is in motion but whose compositions have not yet been registered with a publishing administrator or PRO.
_expectedBehavior: Engine fires publishing.no-registrations-with-recordings (HIGH, HIGH confidence). One PUBLISHING observation in observations[] with severity HIGH. One entry in risks[] (HIGH severity routes through risks). One recommendation in recommendations[] ('Register compositions with a performance rights organization to claim publishing revenue.').
